Thicken Mana  

Description

1: Summon Item: Vial of Viscous Mana

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 100 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 6 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 20 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Self Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Game Description

Thickens mana into a physical form. Consumes a poison vial and a pearl when cast.

Reagents

  • Pearl x 1
  • Poison Vial x 1

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Enchantment of Light
  • Spell: Thicken Mana

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Thicken Mana
Spell: Enchantment of Light
ClassLevel
ENC11
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (24)
  • Scroll 1 Sold By (3)
  • Screenshots

Merchants:


High Keep
  • Krystalle Corsair - 2gp 5sp 1cp

Lesser Faydark
  • a brownie merchant - 1pp 9gp 9sp 4cp

The Plane of Knowledge
  • Illusionist Jerup - 2gp 5sp 1cp
Add Image
Post Comment
new tradeskiller
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2004 at 7:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787902168
View User Forum
Scholar
28 posts
Ok this is going to sound funny, but I have looked all over for this information. Does the enchanter just cast the spell, and if the perl and poison vial are in your bags.. then it combines and makes the mana vial... or does the enc put it in one of the trade skills equipment like the kiln?
▲ Page top
RE: new tradeskiller
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2004 at 9:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255473800
Scholar
619 posts
Just cast the spell with the reagents in your inventory. You end up with the Vial on mana on your cursor.
▲ Page top
what does..
QuoteReply
# May 01 2004 at 3:30 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591786302754
83 posts
What does this spell do? nobody ever said what it does. only where one can find it. do I cast a vial and drink it and get more mana like cannibalizing with a shammy? I assume that's what it does.
▲ Page top
RE: what does..
QuoteReply
# May 26 2004 at 5:47 AM Rating: Decent
Thinquar
Scholar
49 posts
This is the spell used to make Vial of viscous Mana. It is used in tailoring to make Wu's Fighting armor of various types.

It requires a poison vial and a pearl to make

Edited, Wed May 26 06:46:08 2004
▲ Page top
Brownie Village
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2003 at 11:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760914388
16 posts
Hey enchanters ~ in case you need to go to brownie village ask a Druid to go in wolf form. My main is a druid and I've been there a few times. My new is an enchanter 12th lvl.
▲ Page top
Highpass Keep
QuoteReply
# Jul 27 2003 at 1:46 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591791010754
View User Forum
Scholar
126 posts
Found the spell in Highpass Keep on Krystalle Corsair (-92, -229) for 5p 6g 6s 9c
▲ Page top
RE: Highpass Keep
QuoteReply
# Sep 25 2003 at 6:18 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593966405780
Scholar
59 posts
No more need for messing with Brownies...the above post is correct. The Erudite lady named Krystalle Corsair of High Keep (-95,-230 behind a closed door) sells this spell. She also sells 20 Crystallize Mana, 29 Clarify Mana, 39 Distill Mana, and 49 Purify Mana. This is nice and convenient since the pet spells are sold in a room just across the hall.

Edited, Thu Sep 25 19:15:31 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Highpass Keep
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2021 at 12:12 PM Rating: Good
wizen
Scholar
36 posts
To further clarify her position (as she is not on Brewall's) she is on the main floor of High Keep in the second room from the left in the main floor southernmost rooms.
▲ Page top
Brownies
QuoteReply
# Jul 27 2003 at 1:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791010754
View User Forum
Scholar
126 posts
I've tried every illusion available to me at lvl 30, and none of them allowed me to purchase these spells at the Brownie Village.

Benevolence cast on the guards gets you to dubious, unless you're in Ogre form, where you're still at threatening.
▲ Page top
Purpose?
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2003 at 11:52 PM Rating: Decent
Qelah
195 posts
what is this used for? can i create a vial of VM and give it to my other characters to help increase mana? if so, does anyone know the specs?
____________________________
* * * * * * * * * *
▲ Page top
RE: Purpose?
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2003 at 11:52 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592255473800
Scholar
619 posts
used in tradeskills. go to www.eqtraders.com and havea look around (for example, look at tailoring reciepes)

▲ Page top
RE: Purpose?
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2003 at 9:50 PM Rating: Decent
Spiffe
Scholar
106 posts
Vials of mana (viscous and others) are used for tradeskills, not for mana regeneration. Tailored Wu's armor is the first use that comes to mind for vials of viscous mana, but there are probably others.
____________________________

Scholar
44 posts
They are found in the room across from where the pet spells are sold.

Components
QuoteReply
# Feb 01 2003 at 12:27 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591752963757
Sage
54 posts
Components: poison vial, pearl
Gem cost (best price): 4pp 7gp 2sp 5 cp
Use: Wu's gauntlets, wu's fighting armor
▲ Page top
The Brownie
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2003 at 1:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1665361007135
View User Forum
24 posts
I am a 12 Lvl Dark Elf Enchanter, I jest bought the Thicken Mana from the merchent. This is how I did it. First I cast Alliance on the guards, than I cast Invisibility On myself. I went to merchent and than cast Minor Illusion On myself. I was able to buy the Thicken Mana. I than Gated Out.
Hope this helps

▲ Page top
RE: The Brownie
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2003 at 9:47 PM Rating: Decent
Spiffe
Scholar
106 posts
This no longer works. You can use Alliance to get inside the brownie village, but no illusion will get you to anything better than dubious faction. At least none that I tried at lev 16 -- I suppose it's possible that the lev 39 spirit wolf illusion might work, but you probably want this spell before then.

Druid wolf form still works. Best bet is either have a friend pick up the spell, or get one to cast wolf form on you.
____________________________
Help keep Allakhazam useful -- rate posts.
▲ Page top
RE: The Brownie
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2004 at 5:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759008137
10 posts
I just did what that other just said and it work just fine
▲ Page top
Thicken Mana
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2003 at 1:52 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591784159605
23 posts
Please help, where can I find poison vial?

Thanks for your help.

Ladybug :)
▲ Page top
RE: Thicken Mana
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2003 at 5:47 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591777961394
4 posts
You can find poison vials on different vendors:
Conium Darkblade (Dagnors Cauldron)
Toxdil (Freeport West)
Gindlin Toxfodder (Western Karana)
Brak Daggermist (Firiona Vie)
Nubs Blackgranite (Lake of Ill Omen)
Olowakn Telrok (Echo Caverns)
Ferusal (Shadow Haven)
Mugdah (Shar Vahl)

Or you can use pottery to make one!

Nienya (Erudite Enchanter)
▲ Page top
RE: Thicken Mana
QuoteReply
# May 01 2003 at 6:58 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
Also Telir Na`Shalith ( -114, +1438, -108 in Plane of Knowledge)
▲ Page top
Where sold
QuoteReply
# Dec 24 2002 at 12:36 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591783941390
13 posts
The enchanter mana spells are sold in the brownie village in Lesser Faydark. Common shopping methods are a) wolf form, b) enchanter faction-boosting spell on the guards outside, then minor illusion next to the merchant to shop (for enchanters below level 24), or c) illusion earth elemental (for enchanters level 24 and above)
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# May 19 2003 at 8:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781546939
Scholar
781 posts
